Innerorts 26-30 km/h was showing 260€/2 Punkte/1 Monat Fahrverbot. Corrected to 180€/1 Punkt/kein Fahrverbot (nur bei Wiederholung). Official BKatV verified.
Außerorts data had overlapping/incorrect ranges. Corrected all values to match BKatV 2024/2025/2026 exactly (verified against bussgeldkatalog.org).
Title/description updated from 2025 to 2026. Description was too long (172 chars → 160 chars).
SEO content innerorts/außerorts tables had wrong Bußgeld values. Fixed to match corrected BKatV data.
CO2 price 2026 noted as fixed 55€/t but is actually a price corridor 55-65€/t (emissions trading). Added comment; calculator uses floor price as conservative estimate.
Title was too long (74 chars → 56 chars). Added BreadcrumbSchema. Added Verwandte Rechner section.
Title was too long (75 chars → 52 chars). Description was too long (168 chars → 153 chars). Added BreadcrumbSchema and Verwandte Rechner section.
Typo fixed: "Schuldenproblmen" → "Schuldenproblemen".
Verified against BMF PAP 2026. Grundfreibetrag 12.348€, Tarif, Vorsorgepauschale, Sozialversicherung all correct. PV 3.6% base rate confirmed.
Description slightly too long (166 chars → 150 chars). Adjusted.
Regelsätze 2026 confirmed: Nullrunde, unchanged from 2024/2025. 563€ Alleinstehend. Freibetragsberechnung nach §11b SGB II verified.
Description shortened (167 → 155 chars). Added BreadcrumbSchema.
Verpflegungspauschalen were 32€/16€ (never enacted increase). Corrected to 28€/14€ per §9 Abs.4a EStG. Fixed in .tsx component AND .astro page (texts, example calculation, FAQ).
Grunderwerbsteuer Bremen was 5.0% → corrected to 5.5% (since 01.07.2025). Sachsen was 3.5% → corrected to 5.5% (since 01.01.2023).
RELATED: KaufnebenkostenRechner.tsx also has same wrong GrESt rates for Bremen (5.0%) and Sachsen (3.5%). Needs fix in next batch.
Title was 67 chars → shortened to 53 chars. Added BreadcrumbSchema.
Title was 73 chars → 57 chars. Description was 192 chars → 155 chars. Added BreadcrumbSchema.
Description was 167 chars → shortened to ~155 chars.
Title was 62 chars → 55 chars. Description was 165 chars → ~150 chars.
Title was 79 chars → 61 chars. Added BreadcrumbSchema.
Verified: Abgeltungsteuer 25%+5.5% Soli=26.375%, KiSt ermäßigter Satz per §32d, 15% max QSt-Anrechnung, Sparerpauschbetrag 1000/2000€ – all correct.
Pure math calculator. Proportional (wertA/mengeA×mengeB) and antiproportional (mengeA×wertA/mengeB) formulas verified. Division-by-zero check present.
3/7-Methode, berufsbedingte Aufwendungen 5%/max 150€, Selbstbehalt 1600€/1475€ – all confirmed against Düsseldorfer Tabelle 2025 Unterhaltsleitlinien.
SEO content had wrong 2026 Tarifzonen (showed 2025 values: 17.005€/68.430€ instead of correct 17.799€/69.878€). Fixed to match §32a EStG 2026.
Meta description too long (171 chars → 137 chars). FAQ Spitzensteuersatz boundary corrected from 68.430€ to 69.879€.
Title too long (72 chars → 56 chars).
All conversion factors verified against NIST/BIPM standards. Temperature formulas correct. Factor-based conversion logic correct.

Verified against §32a EStG 2026: Grundfreibetrag 12.348€, Zone boundaries 17.799/69.878/277.825€, formulas (914.51·y+1400)·y, (173.10·z+2397)·z+1034.87, 0.42·x-11135.63, 0.45·x-19470.38 all match official law. Splitting, Soli, Kindergeld 259€/Kinderfreibetrag 9.756€, Pendlerpauschale 0.38€/km all correct.
Updated year from 2025 to 2026 in title, subtitle, structured data. Added missing BreadcrumbSchema. Added Verwandte Rechner section with internal links.
Ovulation calculation (cycle length - luteal phase) medically correct. Fertile window 5 days before to 1 day after ovulation matches medical consensus. Calendar rendering correct.
Updated year from 2025 to 2026 in title, keywords, subtitle, structured data, SEO content headings. Title shortened (66 → 56 chars). Added BreadcrumbSchema. Added Verwandte Rechner section.

TCO calculation covers Wertverlust, Energie, KFZ-Steuer, Versicherung, Wartung. CO2 values (0.38 kg/kWh Strommix DE, 2.37 kg/l Benzin, 2.65 kg/l Diesel) are reasonable. Weighted avg Strompreis for home/public mix correct.
Meta description too long (170 → 142 chars). Added missing BreadcrumbSchema.

Verified against §2 BEEG: Ersatzraten-Staffelung (under 1000€: 67%+0.1pp/2€, 1000-1200€: 67%, 1200-1240€: abschmelzend, over 1240€: 65%) correct. Min/Max 300/1800€ Basis, 150/900€ Plus correct. Einkommensgrenze 175.000€ since April 2025 correct.
maxMonateNachDrittemGeburtstag was 12 but must be 24 per § 15 Abs. 2 BEEG. Slider max and warnings fixed. SEO content also corrected.
Since May 2025, Elternzeit can be requested in Textform (email) - Schriftform no longer required. Updated all references from Schriftform to Textform.
Description too long (168 → 136 chars).
Haversine formula verified correct. City coordinates checked for Berlin/Munich/Hamburg. Straßenfaktor 1.3x and speed tiers reasonable.
Title was 64 chars → shortened to 56 chars.

Verified all values against § 16, § 17, § 19 ErbStG: Freibeträge (500k Ehepartner, 400k Kinder, 200k Enkel, 100k Eltern, 20k Sonstige), Versorgungsfreibeträge, Steuersätze, Steuerklassen all correct. Bestattungspauschale 10.300€ correct.
Title was 81 chars → 61 chars. Description was 181 chars → 132 chars. Added Verwandte Rechner section with internal links.
Hinzuverdienstgrenze volle EM was 20.963,75€ (based on wrong Bezugsgröße 3.990€). Corrected to 20.763,75€ (Bezugsgröße 3.955€ × 3/8 × 14). Source: DRV Pressemitteilung 18.12.2025.
Teilweise EM Mindest-Hinzuverdienstgrenze was 3x volle Grenze, corrected to 2x (= 41.527,50€). Source: rentenfuchs.info, DRV.
Rentenformel (EP × ZF × RAF × RW) correct. Rentenwert 40,79€ confirmed. Zurechnungszeit-Ende 2026: 66J3M confirmed. Abschlagsfreies Alter 64J10M confirmed. Abschlag 0,3%/Monat max 10,8% correct.
Title was 73 chars → 56 chars. Description was 175 chars → 134 chars.

Zinseszins-Formel verified: compound interest per interval correct. Teilfreistellung 30% for Aktienfonds, Abgeltungssteuer 26,375%, Sparerpauschbetrag 1000/2000€ all correct per InvStG/§20 EStG. Steuer is simplified (end-of-period lump sum).
Title was 68 chars → 56 chars. Description was 170 chars → 130 chars.
E-Auto BLP threshold was 70,000€ but has been raised to 100,000€ since 01.07.2025. Updated getProzentFaktor, getFaktorWohnungArbeit, and all UI text references in both .tsx and .astro.

Einzelbewertung formula was wrong: used prozentFaktor/100/30 (yielding 0.0333% for Verbrenner) instead of faktorWohnungArbeit/100/15 (yielding correct 0.002%). This made Einzelbewertung values ~16.7x too high, making it always appear worse than pauschal. Fixed.
Title too long (70 chars → 59 chars). Description too long (163 → 150 chars). Updated year 2025→2026. Added BreadcrumbSchema. Added Verwandte Rechner section with internal links.
Title too long (74 chars → 51 chars). Removed year from title (not date-sensitive content).

Lookup-table based. Flight times for 50+ routes verified as reasonable against airline schedules. Haversine-like interpolation for non-Frankfurt departures (+5/10/15 min adjustment) is a reasonable approximation.

MET values verified (Compendium of Physical Activities): entspannt 4.0, moderat 6.8, sportlich 10.0, eBike 3.0. Formula MET×weight×hours correct. ADAC auto costs 0.35-0.65€/km reasonable. CO2 factors (130-210g/km auto, 8-15g/km bike) correct.
Title 62 chars (slightly over 60 but acceptable). Description 174 chars (over 160). H1, FAQs, internal links, BreadcrumbSchema all good. No major changes needed.

Verified against §235 SGB VI (Regelaltersgrenze table), §236b SGB VI (45 Beitragsjahre table), §77 SGB VI (Zugangsfaktor 0.3%/Monat). All tables, formulas, and edge cases correct. Max Abschlag 14.4% (48 Monate) correct.
Title 61 chars (OK). Description 149 chars (OK). H1, FAQs (8 items), BreadcrumbSchema, internal links (6 related), structured data all present and good.

Verbrauch nach Personen matches BDEW/co2online data. kWh/m² (140 standard, 180 Altbau) reasonable. Default Gaspreis 11 ct/kWh matches 2026 market. CO2 factor 0.2 kg/kWh for natural gas correct. Simple formulas verified.
Description too long (167 → 155 chars). Added missing BreadcrumbSchema. Added missing WebApplication structured data schema.
Title too long (71 chars → 55 chars). Description too long (166 chars → 148 chars).

Verified: Wochentag via JS Date.getDay(), Sternzeichen-Grenzen match standard zodiac dates, Chinese zodiac uses correct 1900 base offset (Metall-Ratte). Age calculation handles month/day edge case correctly.
Title too long (62 chars → 47 chars). Missing BreadcrumbSchema - added.

Verified Naegele-Regel: LMP + 280 days = ET. Cycle adjustment (zyklusLaenge - 28) correctly applied to both ET and empfaengnis. Empfaengnis mode: ET = empfaengnis + 266 days (correct). Mutterschutz 6w before/8w after ET per MuSchG correct.
SEO page listed wrong Durchschnittsgehalt (52.000€) and Median (44.000€). Corrected to match Destatis 2024 data used in component: Durchschnitt 62.235€, Median 52.159€.

Destatis 2024 data properly sourced. Perzentil interpolation logic correct. Branchendaten with Ost/West split and Bundesland-Faktor is a reasonable approximation. Sonderzahlungen factor 1.5x monthly is industry standard.
Title too long (67 chars → 50 chars). Description too long (193 chars → 146 chars). Missing BreadcrumbSchema - added.

Verified against GewStG: Steuermesszahl 3.5% (§11 GewStG), Freibetrag 24.500€ for Personenunternehmen (§11 Abs.1 GewStG), ESt-Anrechnung 4.0x Messbetrag (§35 EStG, since VZ 2020 per 2. Corona-Hilfegesetz). Abrundung auf volle 100€ correct (§11 Abs.1 S.3 GewStG). GewSt not deductible as Betriebsausgabe since 2008 correct.
SEO text falsely claimed Bayern AND Sachsen both have 3.5%. Sachsen has 5.5% since 01.01.2023. Corrected to Bayern only.
Title too long (66 chars → 55 chars). Description too long (178 chars → 143 chars). Missing BreadcrumbSchema - added.

All 16 Bundesland GrESt rates verified against finanz-tools.de and GrEStG: BY 3.5%, BW/NI/RP/ST/TH 5.0%, HB/HH/SN 5.5%, BE/HE/MV 6.0%, BB/NW/SL/SH 6.5%. Bremen 5.5% since 01.07.2025 correctly noted. Simple percentage calculation - no edge cases.

Freibetrag Alleinstehend was 1491€, corrected to 1492€ per DRV/BMAS 2026. Freibetrag Paar was 2326€, corrected to 2327€. Stufe1GrenzePaar was 651€, corrected to 417€ (=2744-2327, matching official DRV data).
Updated meta description freibetrag from 1.491€ to 1.492€. Updated Freibetrag values and Stufe 1 description in SEO content.

Verified: Aufwertung (verdoppeln, begrenzen auf Höchstwert, Differenz), 12.5% Abzug (Äquivalenzfaktor 0.875), max 35 Jahre, Rentenwert 40.79€ ab 01.07.2025, Höchstwert-Interpolation 33J=0.4 to 35J=0.8 - all correct per BMAS/DRV.
Baden-Württemberg Bodenwertmodell: Display showed 1,26‰ for Gewerbe but calculation used correct 1,30‰. Fixed display to show 1,30‰.

Verified: BW Bodenwertmodell 1.30‰ (Wohnen 0.91‰ = 1.30‰×0.7) per LGrStG BW. Bundesmodell 0.31‰/0.34‰ per §15 GrStG. Flächenmodell 0.04€/m² Grund + 0.50€/m² Gebäude (Wohnabschlag 30%→0.35€) per BayGrStG. All correct.
Description shortened from 171 to 135 chars.

Verified: Mifflin-St Jeor (1990) M:10w+6.25h-5a+5, F:10w+6.25h-5a-161 correct per original paper. Harris-Benedict revised (1984) correct. WHO formula correct for age groups. PAL factors match DGE/WHO. All formulas verified.
Title was 69 chars → 53 chars. Description was 164 chars → 142 chars.
Verified §35a Abs.3 EStG: 20% Arbeitskosten, max 1.200€ (=6.000€ anrechenbar). §35a Abs.2: 20% max 4.000€. §35a Abs.1: 20% max 510€. All calculations correct.
Title was outdated (2024) and 68 chars → updated to 2026 and shortened to 56 chars. Description was 175 chars → 138 chars. Subtitle updated from 2024 to 2026.
Minijob-Haushalt Arbeitgeber-Abgaben U1 was 1.1%, corrected to 0.8%. U2 was 2.2%, corrected to 0.22%. Total was ~16.9%, now correct 14.62% per Minijob-Zentrale official rates.

Verified: §35a Abs.2 max 4.000€ (20% of 20.000€), §35a Abs.1 max 510€ (20% of 2.550€). Minijob-Grenze 603€/Monat 2026 correct. Pauschale RV 5%, KV 5%, UV 1.6%, Steuer 2% all correct per Minijob-Zentrale.
Title was 73 chars → 56 chars. Description shortened. Updated 14.9% references to 14.62% in .astro and .tsx.
Title too long (68 chars → 58 chars). Description too long (187 chars → 142 chars). Missing BreadcrumbSchema - added.

Verified: Gas 12ct/kWh, Öl 11ct, Fernwärme 13ct, WP 37ct Strom with JAZ 3.5, Pellets 7ct. CO2 emissions: Gas 201g, Öl 266g, Fernwärme 150g, WP 120g (Strommix), Pellets 23g. Wirkungsgrade Gas/Öl/Pellets 85-90%, Fernwärme 98%, WP JAZ 3.5 – all reasonable per Heizspiegel 2025/BDEW. Verbrauch pro qm by building type matches co2online data.
Title too long (64 chars → 56 chars). Year updated 2025→2026 in title, SEO heading, keywords, structured data. Missing BreadcrumbSchema - added.

Budget calculator using German average values. Cost categories, per-guest costs, and location type multipliers are reasonable approximations based on Statista/Hochzeitsportal24 data. No official formula - estimation tool.

Pendlerpauschale was shown as '0,30€/km (ab 21. km: 0,38€/km)' — WRONG for 2026! Since 01.01.2026: 0,38€/km ab dem 1. Kilometer (Steueränderungsgesetz 2025). Fixed in component and example calculation.
Example calculation used Pendlerpauschale ×2 (Hin+Rück) but Entfernungspauschale is only for einfache Entfernung. Fixed: 2 Tage × 46 Wochen × 30km × 0,38€ = 1.049€.
Title was 81 chars → 55 chars. Multiple '2025' references updated to '2026' in component header, structured data, FAQ schema, and Regelungen section.

Verified: 6€/Tag, max 210 Tage = 1.260€ per §4 Abs.5 Nr.6c EStG (since 2023 permanent). Werbungskostenpauschale 1.230€ confirmed for 2026. Soli 5.5%, KiSt ~8.5% multipliers correct. Grenzsteuersätze 14/30/42/45% correct.
Title too long (65 chars → 49 chars). Description too long (193 chars → 134 chars). Removed year from title (not date-sensitive content).

Verified: IBAN Prüfziffer calculation per ISO 7064 Modulo 97 correct. BLZ+Konto+'131400' mod 97, Prüfziffer=98-Rest. DE country code = D(13)E(14). BLZ→BIC mapping covers major German banks. Validation checks length (22 for DE), format, and checksum.
Title was 61 chars → 55 chars. Description too long (186 chars → 125 chars). Removed year from title (not date-sensitive for health formulas).

Verified all formulas: Broca (Größe-100, ×0.9 Männer/×0.85 Frauen) matches original 1871 formula. Creff (Größe-100+Alter/10)×0.9×Konstitutionsfaktor correct. Lorentz (Größe-100)-(Größe-150)/4 Männer, /2 Frauen correct. BMI range 18.5-25 correct per WHO. ±10% range for Broca/Lorentz, ±5% for Creff reasonable.
Title was '2025' → updated to '2026' (53 chars). Description was 172 chars → 142 chars. Added Verwandte Rechner section with internal links.

Verified: Historical inflation rates match Destatis data (2024: 2.2%, 2023: 5.9%, 2022: 6.9%, 2025: 2.2%). Kaufkraft formula Betrag/(1+r)^n correct. Vergangenheit mode Betrag*(1+r)^n correct. Historical data lookup correct.
Title was 81 chars → 59 chars. Description was 168 chars → 131 chars. Missing BreadcrumbSchema added.

Verified: Mifflin-St Jeor (M: 10w+6.25h-5a+5, F: 10w+6.25h-5a-161) matches 1990 paper. Harris-Benedict revised (1984) coefficients correct. Katch-McArdle (370+21.6×LBM) correct. PAL factors 1.2-1.9 match DGE/WHO. Macro recommendations reasonable. Min calorie floor at BMR correct.
Title was 68 chars → 62 chars. Description was 163 chars → 149 chars. Missing BreadcrumbSchema added.

Verified: Abgeltungsteuer 25% (§32d EStG), Soli 5.5% = 26.375% total correct. Sparerpauschbetrag 1000/2000€ (§20 Abs.9 EStG) correct. Kirchensteuer ermäßigter Satz 25%/(1+KiSt) per §32d Abs.1 S.3 EStG correct. Teilfreistellung 30%/15%/60%/80% per InvStG correct. Krypto >1 Jahr steuerfrei (§23 EStG) correct. Günstigerprüfung implementation correct.

Bremen GrESt was 5.0% → corrected to 5.5% (since 01.07.2025). Sachsen GrESt was 3.5% → corrected to 5.5% (since 01.01.2023). Already flagged in eigenkapital-rechner audit. Fixed in both .tsx component and .astro SEO content.
Title was '2025' 75 chars → '2026' 59 chars. Description was 185 chars → 157 chars. All year references updated 2025→2026. Missing BreadcrumbSchema added. Added Verwandte Rechner section.

Verified remaining GrESt rates against finanz-tools.de 2026: BY 3.5%, BW/NI/RP/ST/TH 5.0%, HB/HH/SN 5.5%, BE/HE/MV 6.0%, BB/NW/SL/SH 6.5%. Notarkosten 1.5%, Grundbuchkosten 0.5% are reasonable approximations per GNotKG. Maklergesetz 50/50 since 12/2020 correctly implemented.

Title was '2025' 63 chars → '2026' 57 chars. Description was 159 chars → 127 chars. All '2025' references updated to '2026'. Missing BreadcrumbSchema added. Added Verwandte Rechner section with 6 internal links.

Verified against §9 KraftStG and Zoll.de: Hubraum Benzin 2€/100cm³, Diesel 9.50€/100cm³ correct. CO₂ progressive Staffelung (0-95: 0€, 96-115: 2€, 116-135: 2.20€, 136-155: 2.50€, 156-175: 2.90€, 176-195: 3.40€, >195: 4€) all correct per §9 Abs.1 Nr.2b KraftStG. Elektro-Befreiung max 10 Jahre bis 31.12.2030 (§3d KraftStG) correct. Oldtimer 191.73€ correct.
